summary: Integrated ADR 0101 onto mainline release 0.177.6, hardened the flaky step-ca and OpenBao live-apply paths, and re-verified the repo-managed OpenBao and Vaultwarden certificate lifecycle end to end from the dedicated main-integration worktree.

verification.observed: `tests/test_tls_cert_probe.py`, `tests/test_generate_cert_renewal_config.py`, `tests/test_tls_cert_drift.py`, `tests/test_platform_observation_tool.py`, and `tests/test_compose_runtime_secret_injection.py` all passed from the main-integration worktree.

`uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `python3 scripts/generate_cert_renewal_config.py --pretty`, `make syntax-check-openbao`, and `make syntax-check-step-ca` all completed successfully.

verification.check: step-ca live apply from current mainline integration
verification.observed: `make converge-step-ca` completed successfully after the role reset its SSH connection and waited for recovery before the final verification block, eliminating the transient post-start verification failure on `docker-runtime-lv3`.

`make converge-vaultwarden` restored Docker bridge egress policy on `docker-runtime-lv3`, recovered Vaultwarden's PostgreSQL reachability, and re-verified the private controller path through the host Tailscale proxy.

verification.check: OpenBao live apply from current mainline integration
verification.observed: `make converge-openbao` completed successfully after bounded retries were added around the flakiest OpenBao mutation calls, and the end-to-end AppRole, transit, and PostgreSQL dynamic credential verification paths all passed.

`python3 scripts/tls_cert_probe.py --certificate-id openbao-proxy --fail-on never` reported `status: ok` with `hours_remaining: 10`, `python3 scripts/tls_cert_probe.py --certificate-id vaultwarden-private --fail-on never` reported `status: ok` with `hours_remaining: 11`, and `python3 scripts/tls_cert_probe.py --certificate-id step-ca-proxy --fail-on never` reported `status: ok` with `hours_remaining: 23` after the catalog switched that short-lived proxy certificate to hour-based thresholds.

notes: This receipt supersedes the earlier workstream-local replay receipt now that ADR 0101 is fully integrated on mainline release 0.177.6.
The live replay touched step-ca, Vaultwarden, and OpenBao together because the managed certificate lifecycle spans those three surfaces.
The `source_commit` field references the latest fetched `origin/main` baseline the verified main-integration replay was rebased onto.
